title: 2023 Canadian Federal Budget Commentary – Tax Measures
content:
## 2023 Canadian Federal Budget Commentary – Tax Measures
On March 28, 2023, Canada’s Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Finance, Chrystia Freeland, delivered the Liberal Government’s federal budget, “A Made-in-Canada Plan:  Strong Middle Class, Affordable Economy, Healthy Future” (“ Budget 2023 ”). McCarthy Tétrault’s Tax Group has prepared a detailed analysis of tax measures in Budget 2023 that are most relevant to businesses and their owners.
Download the publication, and get in touch with our professionals to find out how they can help you minimize risk and maximize the opportunities and incentives found in Budget 2023.
